HGSS.066.0000:
I listened to the radio while I was at
the ruins.\f
I heard a strange broadcast there.
HGSS.066.0001:
Mary: Why? Why do I have to suffer
through this?\f
MEOWTH, help me!
HGSS.066.0002:
Mary: Oh! You’re my little savior! Will
you take this as my thanks?\f
HGSS.066.0003:
[0103,0000,0000] received the Bright
Powder from Mary!
HGSS.066.0004:
Mary: When a Pokémon holds it, it
lowers the opponent’s accuracy.
HGSS.066.0006:
Mary: Please tune in to me on
Professor Oak’s Pokémon Talk show.
HGSS.066.0010:
Ben: Team Rocket... There is something
they lack. It is music!\f
Music enriches people’s heart and soul.\f
Music lovers would never do such
horrible things at a place like the\r
Radio Tower!
HGSS.066.0011: Ben: Do you listen to our music?
HGSS.066.0012:
Proton, the leader of this Radio Tower
mission... He is so cool.\f
HGSS.066.0013:
Who are you?\f
If you are in the way of Proton...
I mean Team Rocket. I won’t allow that!\f
HGSS.066.0014:
Team Rocket and Proton are all I need!\f
Who cares about Pokémon?
